findings.title: submittal_workflow_steps missing required column
findings.description: The API accepts a required field when creating workflow steps, but the database table has no such column. The value is silently dropped on insert.

findings.title: submittal_responses INSERT missing submittal_id
findings.description: The Insert type requires submittal_id as non-nullable, but the workflow-steps POST handler omits it, causing insert failures.

findings.title: responsible_contractor_id type mismatch with companies.id
findings.description: responsible_contractor_id is integer in submittals but companies.id is UUID. No FK constraint exists, so joins fail silently.

findings.title: ball_in_court semantic conflict
findings.description: Form stores free text, detail view resolves as user UUID, respond route writes UUID. No consistent type or source for the field.

findings.title: Status CHECK constraint conflicts with API values
findings.description: Schema dump shows lowercase CHECK values (draft, submitted) but API uses title-case (Draft, Open, Distributed, Closed). Writes may be rejected.

findings.title: submittal_responses upsert missing unique constraint
findings.description: Upsert uses onConflict on (workflow_step_id, responder_id) but the unique constraint may not exist, causing duplicate responses.

findings.title: Missing POST distribute endpoint
findings.description: No distribute endpoint exists. Distribution is a core Procore workflow step with no API support.

findings.title: Missing POST revisions endpoint
findings.description: No revisions endpoint exists. Creating a new revision of a submittal (distinct from duplicating) has no API support.

findings.title: Response status vocabulary mismatch
findings.description: API uses Received which is not in Procore; Reviewed - No Exception (standard Procore response) is missing from the enum.

findings.title: BIC advancement skips group completion check
findings.description: Ball-in-court advances after the first response in a step rather than waiting for all required responders to complete.

findings.title: 4 table columns always null
findings.description: responsible_contractor, received_from, approvers, and latest_response columns are always null because the API query lacks required joins.

findings.title: ball_in_court form is free-text Input
findings.description: The ball_in_court field is a plain text Input instead of a user select dropdown, causing inconsistency with UUID storage.

findings.title: Package/Spec pickers dont pass selection into form
findings.description: Picker components only console.log the selection instead of updating form state. Selections are lost on submission.

findings.title: Missing form fields
findings.description: Form is missing submittal_package_id, cost_code_id, location_id, linked_drawings, distribution_list, and attachments fields.

findings.title: No attachment upload UI
findings.description: No file upload interface exists anywhere in the submittals feature. Attachments cannot be added.

findings.title: No distribution creation UI
findings.description: No UI to create or manage a distribution list or trigger the distribute action. The distribute workflow is absent from the frontend.

findings.title: History trigger only captures status changes
findings.description: The submittal_history trigger only fires on status column changes. Field-level edits are not recorded in the audit trail.

findings.title: Reviewer step type missing from UI constant
findings.description: The STEP_TYPES constant does not include Reviewer as a valid workflow step type, though the database and Procore support it.

findings.title: Reviewed - No Exception response status not in enum
findings.description: Standard Procore response status Reviewed - No Exception is missing from the API response status enum.

findings.title: submittal_type_id NOT NULL ambiguity
findings.description: Column is NOT NULL but the form does not enforce selection and the API does not validate presence, risking insert failures.

findings.title: Missing DELETE workflow-steps endpoint
findings.description: No endpoint exists to delete individual workflow steps. Users cannot remove steps from a submittal workflow.

findings.title: Missing PUT reorder workflow-steps endpoint
findings.description: No endpoint exists to reorder workflow steps. Step order cannot be changed after creation.
findings.resolution: Implemented in remediation loop 2 with new API routes and compatibility endpoints.

findings.title: Missing POST create package endpoint
findings.description: No endpoint exists to create submittal packages. Packages must be created directly in the database.
findings.resolution: Implemented in remediation loop 2 with new API routes and compatibility endpoints.

findings.title: Missing POST attachments upload endpoint
findings.description: No endpoint exists for uploading attachments to submittals.
findings.resolution: Implemented in remediation loop 2 with new API routes and compatibility endpoints.

findings.title: No auto-close when final step completes
findings.description: When the last workflow step completes, submittal status is not auto-transitioned to Closed. Users must manually close.

findings.title: Create dropdown missing Submittal Package option
findings.description: The create dropdown on the list page only offers individual submittals, not submittal packages.

findings.title: Missing Create & Send submit button
findings.description: Form only has Create button. Procore offers Create & Send which creates and immediately distributes.

findings.title: Detail tabs mismatch
findings.description: Detail view has Workflow tab but is missing Emails tab that Procore provides.

findings.title: Detail sidebar missing 7 fields
findings.description: Sidebar is missing received_from, responsible_contractor, cost_code, location, linked_drawings, distribution_list, and revision_number.

findings.title: Grouped views lack selection and bulk actions
findings.description: Row selection checkboxes and bulk action toolbars are not rendered in grouped display mode.

findings.title: Only 3 of 13 expected filters implemented
findings.description: List only has 3 filters (status, type, spec section). Procore provides 13 including responsible contractor, BIC, package, cost code, and location.

findings.title: Four tables with zero integration
findings.description: submittal_packages, submittal_types, submittal_spec_sections, and submittal_linked_drawings exist in schema but have no API or UI integration.
findings.resolution: Implemented in remediation loop 2 with new API routes and compatibility endpoints.

findings.title: Missing related-items management endpoint
findings.description: No endpoint to manage related items (linking submittals to RFIs, change events). The submittal_related_items table is inaccessible via API.
findings.resolution: Implemented in remediation loop 2 with new API routes and compatibility endpoints.

findings.title: Missing Redistribute toolbar action
findings.description: Detail view toolbar lacks a Redistribute action that Procore provides to re-send a previously distributed submittal.

findings.title: Export limited to client-side CSV
findings.description: Export is client-side CSV only. PDF uses print hack. No Excel export option available.

findings.title: beforeEach navigation to /submittals times out waiting for networkidle
findings.resolution: Updated tests to use project-scoped route and stable readiness assertions

findings.title: Submittals heading not visible in e2e checks, page fails to reach expected UI state
findings.resolution: Aligned selectors and expectations with current Submittals UI
